signals.headline: Mavs End 14-Game Home Losing Streak with 134-128 Win Over Injury-Depleted Lakers Behind Cooper Flagg's Historic 45 Point
signals.raw:
Mavs End 14-Game Home Losing Streak with 134-128 Win Over Injury-Depleted Lakers Behind Cooper Flagg's Historic 45 Points | NO | LOW confidence**  
Cooper Flagg scored 45 points, 9 assists, and 8 rebounds—his second straight 40+ point game and fourth such outing as a teenager, surpassing LeBron James' record—powering Dallas to victory on April 5, snapping a 32-year franchise low in home losses[1][
